scripts.build:web: cross-env TARGET_ENV=web rspeedy build && cross-env TARGET_ENV=web rspack build
scripts.dev: cross-env TARGET_ENV=desktop NODE_ENV=development concurrently -k --raw "rspeedy dev" "dev-ready-rspeedy && rspack dev"
scripts.dev:web: cross-env TARGET_ENV=web NODE_ENV=development concurrently -k --raw "rspeedy dev" "rspack serve"
scripts.start: cross-env TARGET_ENV=desktop npm run build && lynxtron ./dist/desktop

showcase.description: Single-screen desktop demo for mouse move, hover, and cursor states
